raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Declaring a personal commitment to actionable self-improvement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "Small observable changes are reliably superior to vague resolutions",
    "The speaker possesses the capacity to identify and execute such changes",
    "Vague resolutions are inherently unachievable or worthless"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally coherent; the contrast between feasible and infeasible approaches is logically consistent",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker must translate the commitment into concrete, trackable steps with external accountability",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If invoked to avoid systemic change, downplay larger responsibilities, or substitute token actions for substantive progress"
}
